label: ilm-mate migrated content promotion readiness gate

policy.rule: Sprint 26.8 may calculate readiness but must not approve or promote migrated ilm-mate content to production CDN.

requiredEvidence.label: Source identity
requiredEvidence.notes: Confirm original source identity for quran content.

requiredEvidence.label: License or written redistribution permission
requiredEvidence.notes: Attach license text, permission email, or official reuse terms.

requiredEvidence.label: Attribution wording
requiredEvidence.notes: Confirm exact public attribution wording before CDN promotion.

requiredEvidence.label: Checksum / integrity plan
requiredEvidence.notes: Record checksum method and integrity verification plan.

requiredEvidence.label: Scholarly reviewer sign-off
requiredEvidence.notes: Capture qualified reviewer sign-off for sacred content accuracy.

requiredEvidence.label: Production promotion approval
requiredEvidence.notes: Must remain blocked until all required evidence is complete.

nextActions: Complete source identity evidence for Quran, Tafseer and Hadith.
Complete license or written permission evidence for every migrated source.
Confirm public attribution wording for each domain.
Record checksum and integrity verification plan.
Keep productionApproved=false until a future explicit production-promotion sprint.
